entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Major staple food crop expected to feed a global population of 9 billion by 2050

entities.name: WEEDS
entities.description: Plants that act as major constraints limiting rice productivity

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL WEED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Economic and effective approaches for managing weeds in rice during climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental shift affecting agricultural productivity and weed management

entities.name: RICE PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of rice yield which is limited by the presence of weeds

entities.name: DRY-DIRECT-SEEDING
entities.description: A rice cultivation method where weed constraints are more severe

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENT RICE CULTIVARS
entities.description: Rice varieties designed to be resilient to climate change and competitive against weeds

entities.name: WEED COMPETITIVENESS
entities.description: The ability of rice cultivars to compete effectively against weeds
